commands.help: Inject shellcode via clipboard window class (CLIPBRDWNDCLASS)
commands.long_help: Injects shellcode using the clipboard technique with direct syscalls loaded from ntdll on disk. Targets processes that have a CLIPBRDWNDCLASS window (e.g., explorer.exe, vmtoolsd.exe, or the clipboard svchost.exe on Windows 10). Overwrites the IUnknown COM interface on the clipboard data object and triggers execution via WM_DESTROYCLIPBOARD.

arguments.name: pid
arguments.desc: Target process ID (must have a CLIPBRDWNDCLASS window, e.g., explorer.exe, vmtoolsd.exe)
